title: Where companies actually sit on AI
subtitle: Two axes that matter: how much AI capability is in the org, and how deeply it's wired into how work gets done.
caption: Framing for editorial use.

tl.label: Curious but stuck
tl.description: Skilled people, no real surface area for the work to land on.

tr.label: Operating differently
tr.description: AI fluency plus embedded workflows. The rare combination.

bl.label: Tool tourism
bl.description: A license for everyone, no one changed how they work.

br.label: Narrow automation
br.description: A few deep integrations, but only a handful of people can extend them.
